title: Master Control Signal
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Master Control Signal''' was a special, coded override circuit hardwired into [[World Devastator]]s to prevent them from being operated if they somehow were either captured by the enemy, or went haywire of their own accord. Broadcast from the [[Master Control Computer]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], the Master Control Signal used new [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] frequencies and was broadcast continuously. The Master Control Signal was responsible for coordinating the functions of all World Devastators in a [[Battle group|battlegroup]]. One of the most closely guarded [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] secrets, the Master Control Signal was stolen by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and implanted in [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], allowing the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] to command the [[World Devastator]]s to shut down and turn on each other during the [[Battle of Calamari]].
